summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new testimonials carousel and case study highlights on Seymour Law homepage. All U.S. Embassy Nassau features working perfectly with responsive design and smooth animations.
passed_tests: Testimonials section displays with prominent U.S. Embassy Nassau badge
Testimonials carousel shows 5-star ratings and client quotes with framer-motion animations
Carousel navigation buttons (prev/next) work correctly with smooth transitions
Carousel dot indicators (5 total) work and show active states properly
U.S. Embassy Referred Client badges appear on 4 out of 5 testimonials
Case Studies section displays with U.S. Embassy Recommended badge
4 case study cards display with category, title, description, and outcome sections
Embassy Referred badges appear on 3 out of 4 case studies as intended
Navigation menu includes new Testimonials and Case Studies links
Smooth scrolling to new sections works perfectly on click
Mobile responsive design includes new nav links in mobile menu
Tablet view displays both sections with proper responsive layout
Case Studies CTA button navigates to contact section
Contact form mocked submission shows success message after 1 second
All animations trigger on scroll using framer-motion AnimatePresence
Carousel transitions use proper enter/center/exit animations
All sections maintain consistent navy/gold design theme
